chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-6550 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Direction. 1. For orders on Misc. No.27935/2022. 2. For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 23.09.2025. Mr. Ali Nawaz, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith Ghulam Muhammad, Assistant Registrar, Cooperative Societies and Inspector Ms. Afshan Bibi of FIA. ----- Parawise comments have been filed on behalf of the Respondent No.19, which are taken on record. The comments disclose that after conclusion of an enquiry and Forensic Audit of the Society, the relevant report has been submitted by the FIA before the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan in Suo Moto No.06/2017. In view of such Statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press this Petition further and submits that the Petitioner would pursue the matter of the report before the Honourable Supreme Court and otherwise avail his remedy in respect of his particular Plot through an appropriate civil proceeding. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
